links.title: Upstream SS14 dashboards (reference for future diffs)

panels.description:
* Packets: real UDP packets.
* Messages: Lidgren messages.

Lidgren can combine multiple messages into one UDP packet so these numbers are not necessarily equal.
panels.title: Packets

panels.description:
How many messages are currently stored by Lidgren.

* Stored: Reliable messages that are stored in case they need to be re-sent.
* Unsent: Messages that have not yet been sent because of network overload.
panels.title: Stored Messages

panels.description: How many reliable messages are being re-sent by Lidgren.
panels.title: Resent Messages

panels.description: How many messages are getting dropped by Lidgren. This usually indicates duplicates or sequencing issues.
panels.title: Dropped Messages

panels.description: Shows ratio of the mapped string serializer getting hit. That means a string of text over the network could be sent as an integer ID instead of the full contents.
panels.title: Mapped string hit rate
String serializer missed chars per second

matcher.options: Hardware Corrupted - Amount of RAM that the kernel identified as corrupted / not working

panels.description: How often the GC is running, by generation.
panels.title: GC Per Minute

title: Vacation Station - Perf Metrics
description: Per-server performance deep-dive adapted from upstream SS14 (https://docs.spacestation14.com/en/community/infrastructure-reference/grafana-dashboards.html). Datasource bindings rewritten to reference Vacation Station provisioned datasources by name (Prometheus, Loki). The $Server variable is populated live from Prometheus; the default fork instance is `vacation-station`.
